compoundThreats.description: Coordinated perimeter/sensor anomaly in Sector Foxtrot-2 — simultaneous radar and ground disturbance.
Multi-vector denial in Sector Alpha-7 — ground sensor, cyber intrusion, and comms jamming.
Coordinated multi-sensor infiltration in Sector Delta-1 — no explicit correlation, detected by proximity.
Sustained cyber assault on Sector Bravo-3 — dual intrusion vectors plus comms disruption.
Ground approach and perimeter breach attempt in Sector Foxtrot-2 — implicit pattern, no correlation IDs.
Full-spectrum assault on Sector Gamma-5 — sensor, cyber, and comms under Storm-phase cover.
Rapid multi-domain strike on Sector Echo-9 — high-confidence perimeter breach, cyber intrusion, and ground sensor surge.
